_comment: Single source of truth for SEO/site identity, read by src/build_site.py at build time. The base_url is the FINAL public URL (a subfolder on the pharmeasy.in apex). In production this path is reverse-proxied by PharmEasy's edge to the GitHub Pages origin; it is NOT a DNS CNAME. Keep all in-page asset references relative so the same build works on both the github.io staging origin and the proxied production path. To swap the URL later, edit base_url here only.
title: Mosquito Watch | Dengue & Malaria Risk in India | PharmEasy
description: Track dengue, malaria and chikungunya conditions across India through breeding weather, fever searches and officially confirmed cases. A weather-based screening guide, not a case forecast or medical advice.
og_image_alt: Mosquito Watch by PharmEasy: a breeding-favourability map of dengue, malaria and chikungunya conditions across India.

publisher.name: PharmEasy
publisher._sameAs_note: VERIFY these handles with the brand team before launch; wrong sameAs URLs hurt the knowledge graph.

_env_note: is_production is overridden by the SITE_ENV env var (production|staging) in build_site.py. Default is staging, which emits a Disallow-all robots.txt so the github.io origin is not indexed; canonical always points at base_url so any origin defers to the production URL.
